name: asterix_high_conf_disagree_boost
description: Boost replay priority for high-confidence disagreements so the agent relearns confident-but-wrong habits from human demonstrations.
llm_notes: Asterix shows alignment_rate=0.0292 with high_conf_disagree_rate=0.9708 and disagree_near_terminal_rate=0.8636, so confident disagreement dominates and should be oversampled.

name: asterix_imitation_phase_extend_8000
description: Extend imitation-only warmup to stabilize policy before RL takeover in a high-entropy, low-alignment regime.
llm_notes: Mean entropy is 2.0533 (>2.0) while alignment is only 0.0292, indicating the policy remains uncertain and poorly aligned; longer imitation should improve backbone action priors.

name: montezuma_near_death_priority_boost_v2
description: Increase near-death replay emphasis to target persistent disagreement in survival-critical moments.
llm_notes: Montezuma still has disagree_near_terminal_rate=0.7436 and mean_entropy=2.3881 despite existing ops, with eval runs stuck at max_room=1 and total_reward=0.0, so stronger near-death sampling is warranted.
